commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 46%, while the market favors Paraguay at 44%. The sharpest single gap lies on the Paraguay win: the market prices it 20 percentage points higher than the model. This divergence could reflect recent form, injuries, or lineup changes that have shifted since the model's last update, or it may signal that real-money flows are pricing in information the model cannot access. The dashboard surfaces both views without adjudicating which is more reliable.
